nasb.text: I will make an end of Moab,” declares the Lord, “the one who offers sacrifice on the high place and the one who burns incense to his gods.

esv.text: And I will bring to an end in Moab, declares the Lord, him who offers sacrifice in the high place and makes offerings to his god.

cnv.text: 我要滅絕在摩押那些邱壇上獻祭和向他們的神燒香的。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我要灭绝摩押那些在丘坛献祭和向假神烧香的人。
